# Housing gap {#sec-gaps}

<!-- Purpose: the affordable-and-available rental gap by AMI (PUMS, NLIHC-style), the
     starter-home gap (renters who could buy), and minimum income for homeownership by
     price/size/type vs household income profiles. Theme-based takeaway H2s; static ggplot
     only; "Since 2022" callout per section; fig-alt throughout. Built in Task 10. -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

*Section stub — content built in Phase C, Task 10 (see PLAN.md §9).*
